PY

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import S, ZeroMatrix
from sympy.matrices.expressions.matadd import MatAdd, canonicalize
z=ZeroMatrix(2,2)
e=MatAdd(S.Zero,z,z)
print(repr(e), e.args, repr(canonicalize(e)), type(canonicalize(e)))
for x in [MatAdd(z,z), MatAdd(S.Zero,z,z)]: print('doit', repr(x.doit(deep=False)), type(x.doit(deep=False)))
PY
